7-9. MOON IN MERCURYS NAVANSA AND IN ASPECT TO OTHERS. If the Moon is in the
Navansa of Mercury, (i.e. Gemini/Virgo Navansa) and is aspected by Mercury, the native will
be skillful in mechanical, or fine arts (of 64 kinds) and be a poet.
If the Moon is in the Navansa of Mercury and is aspected by Venus, he will have a broad
physique, be an expert musician and will have rich knowledge of sacred passages (& C
Shastra vachnam, Sruti vachanam and Samriti Vachanam).
If the Moon is in the Navansa of Mercury and is aspected by Jupiter, he will be a kings minister,
be a repository of good qualities, be famous and splendourous.
If the Moon is in the Navansa of Mercury and is aspected by Mars, he will be a notorious thief, be
skillful in arguments and be fierce.
If the Moon is in the Navansa of Mercury and is aspected by Saturn, he will be skillful in Shastras
